infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GoLocal needs your location to show you what's happening nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GoLocal uses your location to show nearby events even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GoLocal needs camera access to let you post photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GoLocal needs photo library access to let you post from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GoLocal needs microphone access to record videos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GoLocal needs your location to show what's happening near you.

plugins.cameraPermission: GoLocal needs camera access to let you post photos and videos.
